name: LV_123_SALES_ITEMS
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[LV_123_SALES_ITEMS] AS
              
SELECT
 01 AS PERIOD,
 CLASS.ACTIVE AS CLASS_ACTIVE,
 (CASE CLASS.ACTIVE
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:13046,0)Kullanımda..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:13046,1)Kullanım Dışı..........' ELSE '' END) AS CLASS_ACTIVE_ADI,
 CLASS.CARDTYPE AS CLASS_CARDTYPE,
 (CASE CLASS.CARDTYPE
 WHEN 20 THEN '(*%:1009,20)(MS) Genel Malzeme Sınıfı..........'
 WHEN 21 THEN '(*%:1009,21)(MT) Tablolu Malzeme Sınıfı..........' ELSE '' END) AS CLASS_CARDTYPE_TIPI,
 CLASS.CODE AS CLASS_CODE,
 CLASS.NAME AS CLASS_NAME,
 CLASS.STGRPCODE AS CLASS_STGRPCODE,
 CLASS.PRODUCERCODE AS CLASS_PRODUCERCODE,
 CLASS.SPECODE AS CLASS_SPECODE,
 CLASS.CYPHCODE AS CLASS_CYPHCODE,
 ITEMS.ACTIVE AS ITEMS_ACTIVE,
 (CASE ITEMS.ACTIVE
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:13046,0)Kullanımda..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:13046,1)Kullanım Dışı..........' ELSE '' END) AS ITEMS_ACTIVE_ADI,
 ITEMS.CARDTYPE AS ITEMS_CARDTYPE,
 (CASE ITEMS.CARDTYPE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:1009,1)(TM) Ticari Mal..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:1009,2)(KK) Karma Koli..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:1009,3)(DM) Depozitolu Mal..........'
 WHEN 4 THEN '(*%:1009,4)(SK) Sabit Kıymet..........'
 WHEN 10 THEN '(*%:1009,10)(HM) Hammadde..........'
 WHEN 11 THEN '(*%:1009,11)(YM) Yarı Mamul..........'
 WHEN 12 THEN '(*%:1009,12)(MM) Mamul..........'
 WHEN 13 THEN '(*%:1009,13)(TK) Tüketim Malı..........'
 WHEN 20 THEN '(*%:1009,20)(MS) Genel Malzeme Sınıfı..........'
 WHEN 21 THEN '(*%:1009,21)(MT) Tablolu Malzeme Sınıfı..........' ELSE '' END) AS ITEMS_CARDTYPE_TIPI,
 ITEMS.CODE AS ITEMS_CODE,
 ITEMS.NAME AS ITEMS_NAME,
 ITEMS.STGRPCODE AS ITEMS_STGRPCODE,
 ITEMS.PRODUCERCODE AS ITEMS_PRODUCERCODE,
 ITEMS.SPECODE AS ITEMS_SPECODE,
 ITEMS.CYPHCODE AS ITEMS_CYPHCODE,
 ITEMS.TRACKTYPE AS ITEMS_TRACKTYPE,
 (CASE ITEMS.TRACKTYPE
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:18233,8)İzleme yapılmayacak..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:18233,8)Lot numarası..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:18233,8)Seri numarası..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:18233,8)Seri grubu..........' ELSE '' END) AS ITEMS_IZLEME_TURU,
 UNITSETF.CODE AS UNITSETF_CODE,
 UNITSETF.NAME AS UNITSETF_NAME,
 UNITSETF.SPECODE AS UNITSETF_SPECODE,
 UNITSETF.CYPHCODE AS UNITSETF_CYPHCODE,
 UNITSETL.CODE AS UNITSETL_CODE,
 UNITSETL.NAME AS UNITSETL_NAME,
 CASE WHEN ITMUNITA_2.CONVFACT2>0 THEN ITMUNITA_2.CONVFACT2/ITMUNITA_2.CONVFACT1 ELSE 0 END AS ITMUNITA_2_KATSAYI,
 UNITSETL_2.CODE AS UNITSETL_2_CODE,
 UNITSETL_2.NAME AS UNITSETL_2_NAME,
 CASE WHEN ITMUNITA_3.CONVFACT2>0 THEN ITMUNITA_3.CONVFACT2/ITMUNITA_3.CONVFACT1 ELSE 0 END AS ITMUNITA_3_KATSAYI,
 UNITSETL_3.CODE AS UNITSETL_3_CODE,
 UNITSETL_3.NAME AS UNITSETL_3_NAME,
 ITMUNITA_1.LINENR AS ITMUNITA_LINENR,
 ITMUNITA_1.BARCODE AS ITMUNITA_BARCODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.WIDTH AS ITMUNITA_WIDTH,
 UNITSETL1.CODE AS WIDTH_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.LENGTH AS ITMUNITA_LENGTH,
 UNITSETL2.CODE AS LENGTH_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.HEIGHT AS ITMUNITA_HEIGHT,
 UNITSETL3.CODE AS HEIGHT_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.AREA AS ITMUNITA_AREA,
 UNITSETL4.CODE AS AREA_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.VOLUME_ AS ITMUNITA_VOLUME_,
 UNITSETL5.CODE AS VOLUME_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.GROSSVOLUME AS ITMUNITA_GROSSVOLUME,
 UNITSETL6.CODE AS GROSSVOLUME_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.WEIGHT AS ITMUNITA_WEIGHT,
 UNITSETL7.CODE AS WEIGHT_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.GROSSWEIGHT AS ITMUNITA_GROSSWEIGHT,
 UNITSETL8.CODE AS GROSSWEIGHT_CODE,
 ITMUNITA_1.CONVFACT1 AS ITMUNITA_CONVFACT1,
 ITMUNITA_1.CONVFACT2 AS ITMUNITA_CONVFACT2,
 STLINE.LOGICALREF AS STLINE_LOGICALREF,
 STLINE.LINETYPE AS STLINE_LINETYPE,
 (CASE STLINE.LINETYPE
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:13063,1)Malzeme..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:13063,2)Promosyon..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:13063,3)İndirim..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:13063,4)Masraf..........'
 WHEN 4 THEN '(*%:13063,5)Hizmet..........'
 WHEN 5 THEN '(*%:13063,6)Depozito..........'
 WHEN 6 THEN '(*%:13063,7)Karma Koli..........'
 WHEN 7 THEN '(*%:13063,8)Karma Koli Satırı..........'
 WHEN 8 THEN '(*%:13063,9)Sabit Kıymet..........'
 WHEN 9 THEN '(*%:13063,10)Ek Malzeme..........'
 WHEN 10 THEN '(*%:13063,11)Malzeme Sınıfı..........'
 WHEN 11 THEN '(*%:13063,12)Fason..........' ELSE '' END) AS STLINE_SATIR_TURU,
 STLINE.PREVLINEREF AS STLINE_PREVLINEREF,
 STLINE.PREVLINENO AS STLINE_PREVLINENO,
 STLINE.TRCODE AS STLINE_TRCODE,
 STLINE.DATE_ AS STLINE_DATE_,
 DATEPART(YYYY,STLINE.DATE_) AS  STLINE_YEAR,
 DATEPART(qq,STLINE.DATE_) AS STLINE_QUARTER,
 CASE WHEN DATEPART(qq,STLINE.DATE_) IN (1,2) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS STLINE_HALF,
 DATEPART(MM,STLINE.DATE_) AS  STLINE_MONTH,
 DATEPART(wk,STLINE.DATE_) AS STLINE_WEEK,
 DATEPART(dd,STLINE.DATE_) AS STLINE_DAY,
 STLINE.FTIME AS STLINE_FTIME,
 STLINE.GLOBTRANS AS STLINE_GLOBTRANS,
 STLINE.SOURCEINDEX AS STLINE_SOURCEINDEX,
 STLINE.SOURCECOSTGRP AS STLINE_SOURCECOSTGRP,
 STLINE.DESTINDEX AS STLINE_DESTINDEX,
 STLINE.DESTCOSTGRP AS STLINE_DESTCOSTGRP,
 STLINE.IOCODE AS STLINE_IOCODE,
 (CASE STLINE.IOCODE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:23203,5)Giriş..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:23203,5)Ambar Giriş..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:23203,5)Ambar Çıkış..........'
 WHEN 4 THEN '(*%:23203,5)Çıkış..........' ELSE '' END) AS STLINE_IOCODE_TURU,
 STLINE.STFICHEREF AS STLINE_STFICHEREF,
 STLINE.STFICHELNNO AS STLINE_STFICHELNNO,
 STLINE.INVOICEREF AS STLINE_INVOICEREF,
 STLINE.INVOICELNNO AS STLINE_INVOICELNNO,
 STLINE.CLIENTREF AS STLINE_CLIENTREF,
 STLINE.ORDTRANSREF AS STLINE_ORDTRANSREF,
 STLINE.ORDFICHEREF AS STLINE_ORDFICHEREF,
 STLINE.SPECODE AS STLINE_SPECODE,
 STLINE.DELVRYCODE AS STLINE_DELVRYCODE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN (STLINE.AMOUNT*(CASE STLINE.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE STLINE.UINFO2/STLINE.UINFO1 END)) ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_AMOUNT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0 ELSE (STLINE.AMOUNT*(CASE STLINE.UINFO2 WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE STLINE.UINFO2/STLINE.UINFO1 END)) END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_AMOUNT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.PRICE  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_PRICE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.PRICE END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_PRICE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.TOTAL  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_TOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.TOTAL END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_TOTAL,
 STLINE.PRCURR AS STLINE_PRCURR,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.PRPRICE  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_PRPRICE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.PRPRICE END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_PRPRICE,
 STLINE.TRCURR AS STLINE_TRCURR,
 STLINE.TRRATE AS STLINE_TRRATE,
 STLINE.REPORTRATE AS STLINE_REPORTRATE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DISTCOST  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DISTCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DISTCOST END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DISTCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DISTDISC  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DISTDISC,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DISTDISC END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DISTDISC,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DISTEXP  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DISTEXP,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DISTEXP END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DISTEXP,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DISTPROM  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DISTPROM,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DISTPROM END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DISTPROM,
 STLINE.DISCPER AS STLINE_DISCPER,
 STLINE.LINEEXP AS STLINE_LINEEXP,
 STLINE.UOMREF AS STLINE_UOMREF,
 STLINE.USREF AS STLINE_USREF,
 STLINE.UINFO1 AS STLINE_UINFO1,
 STLINE.UINFO2 AS STLINE_UINFO2,
 STLINE.VATINC AS STLINE_VATINC,
 STLINE.VAT AS STLINE_VAT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.VATAMNT  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_VATAMNT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.VATAMNT END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_VATAMNT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.VATMATRAH  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_VATMATRAH,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.VATMATRAH END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_VATMATRAH,
 STLINE.BILLED AS STLINE_BILLED,
 (CASE STLINE.BILLED
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:23205,27)Faturalanmamış irsaliyeler..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:23205,27)Faturalanmış irsaliyeler..........'  ELSE '' END) AS STLINE_BILLED_TIPI,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.OUTCOST  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_OUTCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.OUTCOST END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_OUTCOST,
 STLINE.CANCELLED AS STLINE_CANCELLED,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.LINENET  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_LINENET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.LINENET END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_LINENET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DIFFPRCOST  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DIFFPRCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DIFFPRCOST END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DIFFPRCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DIFFREPPRICE  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DIFFREPPRICE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DIFFREPPRICE END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DIFFREPPRICE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN STLINE.DIFFPRCRCOST  ELSE 0 END))) AS STLINE_INPUT_DIFFPRCRCOST,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2) THEN 0  ELSE STLINE.DIFFPRCRCOST END))) AS STLINE_OUTPUT_DIFFPRCRCOST,
 STFICHE.GRPCODE AS STFICHE_GRPCODE,
 (CASE STFICHE.GRPCODE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:1012,3000)Satınalma İrsaliyeleri..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:1012,6000)Satış İrsaliyeleri..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:1012,1000)Malzeme Yönetimi..........' ELSE '' END) AS STFICHE_GRPCODE_TIPI,
 STFICHE.TRCODE AS STFICHE_TRCODE,
 (CASE STFICHE.TRCODE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:1012,3001)Satınalma İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:1012,6002)Perakende Satış İade İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:1012,6003)Toptan Satış İade İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 4 THEN '(*%:1012,6004)Konsinye Çıkış İade İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 5 THEN '(*%:1012,3005)Konsinye Giriş İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 6 THEN '(*%:1012,3006)Satınalma İade İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 7 THEN '(*%:1012,6007)Perakende Satış İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 8 THEN '(*%:1012,6008)Toptan Satış İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 9 THEN '(*%:1012,6009)Konsinye Çıkış İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 10 THEN '(*%:1012,3010)Konsinye Giriş İade İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 11 THEN '(*%:1012,1011)Fire Fişi..........'
 WHEN 12 THEN '(*%:1012,1012)Sarf Fişi..........'
 WHEN 13 THEN '(*%:1012,1013)Üretimden Giriş Fişi..........'
 WHEN 14 THEN '(*%:1012,1014)Devir Fişi..........'
 WHEN 15 THEN '(*%:1012,1015)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Giriş Fişi 1..........'
 WHEN 16 THEN '(*%:1012,1016)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Giriş Fişi 2..........'
 WHEN 17 THEN '(*%:1012,1017)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Giriş Fişi 3..........'
 WHEN 18 THEN '(*%:1012,1018)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Giriş Fişi 4..........'
 WHEN 19 THEN '(*%:1012,1019)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Giriş Fişi 5..........'
 WHEN 20 THEN '(*%:1012,1020)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Çıkış Fişi 1..........'
 WHEN 21 THEN '(*%:1012,1021)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Çıkış Fişi 2..........'
 WHEN 22 THEN '(*%:1012,1022)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Çıkış Fişi 3..........'
 WHEN 23 THEN '(*%:1012,1023)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Çıkış Fişi 4..........'
 WHEN 24 THEN '(*%:1012,1024)Tanımlı Malzeme Fişi - Çıkış Fişi 5..........'
 WHEN 25 THEN '(*%:1012,1025)Ambar Fişi..........'
 WHEN 26 THEN '(*%:1012,3026)Müstahsil İrsaliyesi..........'
 WHEN 30 THEN '(*%:1012,3030)Tanımlı Satınalma İrsaliyesi 1..........'
 WHEN 31 THEN '(*%:1012,3031)Tanımlı Satınalma İrsaliyesi 2..........'
 WHEN 32 THEN '(*%:1012,3032)Tanımlı Satınalma İrsaliyesi 3..........'
 WHEN 33 THEN '(*%:1012,3033)Tanımlı Satınalma İrsaliyesi 4..........'
 WHEN 34 THEN '(*%:1012,3034)Tanımlı Satınalma İrsaliyesi 5..........'
 WHEN 35 THEN '(*%:1012,6035)Tanımlı Satış İrsaliyesi 1..........'
 WHEN 36 THEN '(*%:1012,6036)Tanımlı Satış İrsaliyesi 2..........'
 WHEN 37 THEN '(*%:1012,6037)Tanımlı Satış İrsaliyesi 3..........'
 WHEN 38 THEN '(*%:1012,6038)Tanımlı Satış İrsaliyesi 4..........'
 WHEN 39 THEN '(*%:1012,6039)Tanımlı Satış İrsaliyesi 5..........' ELSE '' END) AS STFICHE_TRCODE_ADI,
 STFICHE.IOCODE AS STFICHE_IOCODE,
 STFICHE.FICHENO AS STFICHE_FICHENO,
 STFICHE.DATE_ AS STFICHE_DATE_,
 STFICHE.FTIME AS STFICHE_FTIME,
 STFICHE.DOCODE AS STFICHE_DOCODE,
 STFICHE.INVNO AS STFICHE_INVNO,
 STFICHE.SPECODE AS STFICHE_SPECODE,
 STFICHE.CYPHCODE AS STFICHE_CYPHCODE,
 STFICHE.INVOICEREF AS STFICHE_INVOICEREF,
 STFICHE.CLIENTREF AS FSTFICHE_CLIENTREF,
 STFICHE.RECVREF AS STFICHE_RECVREF,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.ADDDISCOUNTS  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_ADDDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.ADDDISCOUNTS END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_ADDDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALDISCOUNTS  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALDISCOUNTS END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALDISCOUNTED  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTED,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALDISCOUNTED END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTED,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.ADDEXPENSES  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_ADDEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.ADDEXPENSES END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_ADDEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALEXPENSES  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALEXPENSES END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALDEPOZITO  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALDEPOZITO,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALDEPOZITO END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALDEPOZITO,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALPROMOTIONS  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALPROMOTIONS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALPROMOTIONS END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALPROMOTIONS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TOTALVAT  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TOTALVAT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TOTALVAT END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TOTALVAT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.GROSSTOTAL  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_GROSSTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.GROSSTOTAL END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_GROSSTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.NETTOTAL  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_NETTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.NETTOTAL END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_NETTOTAL,
 STFICHE.REPORTRATE AS STFICHE_REPORTRATE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.REPORTNET  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_REPORTNET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.REPORTNET END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_REPORTNET,
 STFICHE.TRCURR AS STFICHE_TRCURR,
 STFICHE.TRRATE AS STFICHE_TRRATE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN STFICHE.TRNET  ELSE 0 END))) AS STFICHE_INPUT_TRNET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE STFICHE.TRNET END))) AS STFICHE_OUTPUT_TRNET,
 STFICHE.BILLED AS STFICHE_BILLED,
 (CASE STFICHE.BILLED
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:19657,2)Faturalanmış..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:19657,3)Faturalanmamış..........' ELSE '' END)  AS STFICHE_BILLED_TIPI,
 STFICHE.PRODSTAT AS STFICHE_PRODSTAT,
 (CASE STFICHE.PRODSTAT
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:16025,0)Güncel..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:16025,1)Güncel Değil..........' ELSE '' END) AS STFICHE_PRODSTAT_AÇIKLAMA,
 STFICHE.CANCELLED AS STFICHE_CANCELLED,
 (CASE STFICHE.CANCELLED
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:9504,0)İptal Edilmemiş Fişler..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:9504,1)İptal Edilmiş Fişler..........' ELSE '' END) AS STFICHE_CANCELLED_AÇIKLAMA,
 INVOICE.GRPCODE AS INVOICE_GRPCODE,
 (CASE INVOICE.GRPCODE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:1012,4000)Satınalma Faturaları..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:1012,7000)Satış Faturaları..........' ELSE '' END) AS INVOICE_GRPCODE_AÇIKLAMA,
 INVOICE.TRCODE AS INVOICE_TRCODE,
 (CASE INVOICE.TRCODE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:1012,4001)Satınalma Faturası..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:1012,7002)Perakende Satış İade Faturası..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:1012,7003)Toptan Satış İade Faturası..........'
 WHEN 7 THEN '(*%:1012,7007)Perakende Satış Faturası..........'
 WHEN 8 THEN '(*%:1012,7008)Toptan Satış Faturası..........'
 WHEN 9 THEN '(*%:1012,7009)Verilen Hizmet Faturası..........'
 WHEN 10 THEN '(*%:1012,7010)Verilen Proforma Fatura..........'
 WHEN 14 THEN '(*%:1012,7014)Satış Fiyat Farkı Faturası..........'
 WHEN 4 THEN '(*%:1012,4004)Alınan Hizmet Faturası..........'
 WHEN 5 THEN '(*%:1012,4005)Alınan Proforma Fatura..........'
 WHEN 6 THEN '(*%:1012,4006)Satınalma İade Faturası..........'
 WHEN 13 THEN '(*%:1012,4013)Satınalma Fiyat Farkı Faturası..........'
 WHEN 26 THEN '(*%:1012,4026)Müstahsil Makbuzu..........' ELSE '' END) AS INVOICE_TRCODE_ADI,
 INVOICE.FICHENO AS INVOICE_FICHENO,
 INVOICE.DATE_ AS INVOICE_DATE_,
 INVOICE.TIME_ AS INVOICE_TIME_,
 INVOICE.DOCODE AS INVOICE_DOCODE,
 INVOICE.SPECODE AS INVOICE_SPECODE,
 INVOICE.CYPHCODE AS INVOICE_CYPHCODE,
 INVOICE.CLIENTREF AS INVOICE_CLIENTREF,
 INVOICE.RECVREF AS INVOICE_RECVREF,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.ADDDISCOUNTS  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_ADDDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.ADDDISCOUNTS END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_ADDDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALDISCOUNTS  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALDISCOUNTS END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALDISCOUNTED  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTED,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALDISCOUNTED END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALDISCOUNTED,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.ADDEXPENSES  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_ADDEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.ADDEXPENSES END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_ADDEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALEXPENSES  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALEXPENSES END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALEXPENSES,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALDEPOZITO  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALDEPOZITO,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALDEPOZITO END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALDEPOZITO,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALPROMOTIONS  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALPROMOTIONS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALPROMOTIONS END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALPROMOTIONS,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TOTALVAT  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TOTALVAT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TOTALVAT END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TOTALVAT,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.GROSSTOTAL  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_GROSSTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.GROSSTOTAL END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_GROSSTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.NETTOTAL  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_NETTOTAL,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.NETTOTAL END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_NETTOTAL,
 INVOICE.REPORTRATE AS INVOICE_REPORTRATE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.REPORTNET  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_REPORTNET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.REPORTNET END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_REPORTNET,
 INVOICE.TRCURR AS INVOICE_TRCURR,
 INVOICE.TRRATE AS INVOICE_TRRATE,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN INVOICE.TRNET  ELSE 0 END))) AS INVOICE_INPUT_TRNET,
 (((CASE WHEN STLINE.IOCODE IN (1,2,3) THEN 0  ELSE INVOICE.TRNET END))) AS INVOICE_OUTPUT_TRNET,
 SHIPINFO.CODE AS SHIPINFO_CODE,
 SHIPINFO.NAME AS SHIPINFO_NAME,
 SHIPINFO.SPECODE AS SHIPINFO_SPECODE,
 SHIPINFO.CYPHCODE AS SHIPINFO_CYPHCODE,
 CAPIWHOUSE.NR AS CAPIWHOUSE_NR,
 CAPIWHOUSE.NAME AS CAPIWHOUSE_NAME,
 CAPIDIV.NR AS CAPIDIV_NR,
 CAPIDIV.NAME AS CAPIDIV_NAME,
 CAPIDEPT.NR AS CAPIDEPT_NR,
 CAPIDEPT.NAME AS CAPIDEPT_NAME,
 CLCARD.CODE AS CLCARD_CODE,
 CLCARD.DEFINITION_ AS CLCARD_DEFINITION_,
 CLCARD.SPECODE AS CLCARD_SPECODE,
 CLCARD.TAXOFFICE AS CLCARD_TAXOFFICE,
 CLCARD.TAXNR AS CLCARD_TAXNR,
 CLCARD.CYPHCODE AS CLCARD_CYPHCODE,
 CLCARD.INCHARGE AS CLCARD_INCHARGE,
 CLCARD.ACTIVE AS CLCARD_ACTIVE,
 (CASE CLCARD.ACTIVE
 WHEN 0 THEN '(*%:13046,0)Kullanımda..........'
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:13046,1)Kullanım Dışı..........' ELSE '' END) AS CLCARD_ACTIVE_ADI,
 CLCARD.CITY AS CLCARD_CITY,
 CLCARD.TRADINGGRP AS CLCARD_TRADINGGRP,
 CLCARD.CARDTYPE AS CLCARD_CARDTYPE,
 (CASE CLCARD.CARDTYPE
 WHEN 1 THEN '(*%:5003,1)(AL) Alıcı..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:5003,2)(SA) Satıcı..........'
 WHEN 2 THEN '(*%:5003,3)(AS) Alıcı + Satıcı..........'
 WHEN 3 THEN '(*%:5003,4)(GS) Grup Şirketi..........'  ELSE '' END) AS CLCARD_CARDTYPE_ADI,
 PAYPLANS.CODE AS PAYPLANS_CODE,
 PAYPLANS.DEFINITION_ AS PAYPLANS_DEFINITION_,
 PAYPLANS.SPECODE AS PAYPLANS_SPECODE,
 PAYPLANS.CYPHCODE AS PAYPLANS_CYPHCODE,
 PROJECT.CODE AS PROJECT_CODE,
 PROJECT.NAME AS PROJECT_NAME,
 EMCENTER.CODE AS EMCENTER_CODE,
 EMCENTER.DEFINITION_ AS EMCENTER_DEFINITION_,
 SLSMAN.CODE AS SLSMAN_CODE,
 SLSMAN.DEFINITION_ AS SLSMAN_DEFINITION_
FROM
        LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS (NOLOCK)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMCLSAS ITC (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=ITC.CHILDREF AND ITC.UPLEVEL=0
        LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS CLASS (NOLOCK) ON ITC.PARENTREF=CLASS.LOGICALREF
        LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA ITMUNITA_1 (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=ITMUNITA_1.ITEMREF AND ITMUNITA_1.LINENR=1
        LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA ITMUNITA_2 (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=ITMUNITA_2.ITEMREF AND ITMUNITA_2.LINENR=2
        LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA ITMUNITA_3 (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=ITMUNITA_3.ITEMREF AND ITMUNITA_3.LINENR=3
        LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETF UNITSETF (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.UNITSETREF=UNITSETF.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.UNITLINEREF=UNITSETL.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL_2 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_2.UNITLINEREF=UNITSETL_2.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL_3 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_3.UNITLINEREF=UNITSETL_3.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL1 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.WIDTHREF=UNITSETL1.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL2 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.LENGTHREF=UNITSETL2.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL3 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.HEIGHTREF=UNITSETL3.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL4 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.AREAREF=UNITSETL4.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL5 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.VOLUMEREF=UNITSETL5.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL6 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.GROSSVOLREF=UNITSETL6.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL7 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.WEIGHTREF=UNITSETL7.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNITSETL8 (NOLOCK) ON ITMUNITA_1.GROSSWGHTREF=UNITSETL8.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE (NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=STLINE.STOCKREF AND STLINE.LINETYPE NOT IN (2,3,4)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE STFICHE (NOLOCK) ON STLINE.STFICHEREF=STFICHE.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_INVOICE INVOICE (NOLOCK) ON STLINE.INVOICEREF=INVOICE.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..LG_SLSMAN SLSMAN (NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.SALESMANREF=SLSMAN.LOGICALREF AND SLSMAN.FIRMNR=123
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_SHIPINFO SHIPINFO (NOLOCK) ON STFICHE.SHIPINFOREF=SHIPINFO.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIWHOUSE CAPIWHOUSE WITH(NOLOCK) ON STFICHE.SOURCEINDEX=CAPIWHOUSE.NR AND CAPIWHOUSE.FIRMNR=123
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIDIV CAPIDIV (NOLOCK) ON STFICHE.BRANCH=CAPIDIV.NR AND CAPIDIV.FIRMNR=123
 LEFT OUTER JOIN "TIGER3"..L_CAPIDEPT CAPIDEPT (NOLOCK) ON STFICHE.DEPARTMENT=CAPIDEPT.NR AND CAPIDEPT.FIRMNR=123
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLCARD (NOLOCK) ON STFICHE.CLIENTREF=CLCARD.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_PAYPLANS PAYPLANS (NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.PAYDEFREF = PAYPLANS.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_EMCENTER EMCENTER (NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.CENTERREF = EMCENTER.LOGICALREF
 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT PROJECT (NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.PROJECTREF = PROJECT.LOGICALREF
WHERE
 ITEMS.CARDTYPE<>22
